results.title: ‘BJP cadre can’t be part of Annamalai movement’: Nainar Nagenthran
results.description: Addressing media persons, Nagenthran mentioned that only a few state-level leaders and several grassroots functionaries had joined the former BJP state president’s movement.

results.title: Nedumangad murder: Toddler bore months of abuse
results.description: The details emerged during the custodial interrogation of the mother, Akhila and her partner Ashkar, who were taken into two-day police custody.

results.title: UP: Man arrested for raping woman in Hathras
results.description: Hathras: A man was arrested on Saturday for allegedly raping a 20-year-old woman in a village under the Chandpa police station area of Hathras district, police said. According to the FIR lodged by the victim’s father, the woman had gone to a plot near her house on Saturday morning when the accused, identified as Rupesh ... results.title: Jaipur Ebola Scare: Ugandan Woman Isolated With Ebola-Like Symptoms Tests Negative
results.description: A Ugandan woman admitted to a Jaipur hospital with Ebola-like symptoms has tested negative for the Ebola virus, Rajasthan health authorities said. The tourist was isolated at RUHS Hospital as a precaution after developing symptoms associated with the disease, officials added.

results.title: Tamil Nadu: On DGP's orders, cops on foot to win public trust
results.description: The State Police chief has charted out a series of instructions aimed at ensuring a high degree of consistency in field-level policing and enforcement across Tamil Nadu
